_schema: Manually entered match results to supplement scraped tournament data. All entries must reference a tournament URL that already exists in the scraped data (challonge/tournaments.json or start.gg/tournaments.json). Player names go through the same alias/split resolution as scraped data — use the name as it appears in that tournament, or a known alias from player-identities.json. `match_index` is for reference and deduplication only (ordering within a tournament does not affect Glicko-2 period updates). Either `score` or `games` must be provided. `score` is a set-count string in p1-p2 format (e.g. '3-1'); winner is inferred from who has more sets. `games` is an array of per-game goal scores in p1-p2 format (e.g. '3-2'); winner is inferred from who wins more games; close games (margin ≤1 goal) receive a reduced Glicko win score.
